name: @aily-project/lib-sentry
description: 这是面向 AilyBlockly 的 Sentry 系列智能视觉传感器库，支持 Sentry1、Sentry2 和 Sentry3。三个型号采用独立积木、变量类型和功能目录，确保算法不会跨型号混用。
author: 脆脆鲨

bundledSources.name: Sentry-Arduino
bundledSources.author: Tosee Intelligence (hangzhoou) co.,ltd.
bundledSources.reason: Complete upstream Sentry/Sengo protocol driver; Arduino core Wire and Stream are platform prerequisites
